_comment: Enhanced prompts written by Claude Code (running your skills) and read by the app. Ask in chat: 'enhance: <rough idea>' and this file gets rewritten. 'target' is image | video | any so the app can show the right ones per model.

prompts.label: Red fox in snow (cinematic)
prompts.text: A red fox bounding through fresh powder snow at golden hour. Shot 1 (0-3s): low-angle tracking shot, 85mm, shallow depth of field, the fox's breath visible in cold air. Shot 2 (3-6s): slow-motion mid-shot as it pounces, snow spraying, rim-lit by low sun. Shot 3 (6-10s): wide establishing shot, lone fox against a vast white field, soft falling snow, cinematic color grade, gentle ambient wind.

prompts.label: Neon rain market (still)
prompts.text: A neon-lit night street market in the rain, cinematic wide shot, shallow depth of field, reflections on wet cobblestones, steam rising from food stalls, anamorphic lens flares, moody teal-and-magenta color grade, 35mm.

prompts.label: WWI aviator seagull (Pixar)
prompts.text: A charming Pixar-style 3D animated seagull character, expressive large eyes, friendly personable face, perched on a weathered wooden ledge. He wears a vintage brown leather aviator flight cap with fleece lining and brass goggles pushed up on his head, and a soft knitted scarf trailing in the breeze. On each wing is painted a WWI British RFC/RAF roundel — concentric rings with a red center, white middle ring, and blue outer ring. Clean white-grey seagull plumage with subtle iridescence. Warm soft cinematic lighting, golden hour, shallow depth of field, plain softly-blurred neutral background, half-body composition with negative space to one side. Highly detailed feathers, render in the style of a high-end animated feature film, 3:2 aspect.
